name: daily monitor reads source list from the operator-editable PR-SOURCES.yaml registry
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"gate":"pass"}\n' > pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && printf 'sources: [{id: cfpb, source_class: federal-financial-regulator, tier: 1, applies_to: [node]}]\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/monitor.sh" --gate-result pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --once --sources .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'source=cfpb' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
